recommendations.title: Outside the Wire
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a drone pilot is sent into a deadly militarized zone and must work with an android officer to locate a doomsday device.

recommendations.overview: When two married business executives having an affair are blackmailed by a violent criminal, they are forced to turn the tables on him to save their families.
A man who specializes in debunking paranormal occurrences checks into the fabled room 1408 in the Dolphin Hotel. Soon after settling in, he confronts genuine terror.
